name: V2 - PG Listing Pack Draft Shell - Property Registry Test

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only for Module 4A test. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Select 1 Eligible PG Pack Row
nodes.notes: Filters active listing rows with Asset Folder Link and no PG Blurb Output Link. Returns only 1 row for test.

nodes.name: Create Google Doc - PG Pack Draft
nodes.notes: Creates a Google Doc draft shell. If the imported node requires field adjustment, set Title to {{$json['PG Doc Title']}} and content/text to {{$json['PG Pack Draft Body']}}.

folderId.value: ={{ $('Select 1 Eligible PG Pack Row').first().json['Asset Folder ID'] }}

nodes.name: Move Drive - Doc to Asset Folder
nodes.notes: Moves the created Google Doc into the listing asset folder. If file ID expression needs adjustment, use the ID output from the Google Docs node.

nodes.name: Prepare Registry PG Pack Update
nodes.notes: Prepares PG Pack status/link/review fields for the same Property Registry row.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key.

main.node: Create Google Doc - PG Pack Draft
Move Drive - Doc to Asset Folder

meta.description: Creates one Google Doc PG Listing Pack draft shell inside the listing asset folder and updates Property Registry.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Creates only one Google Doc for test mode
Skips rows with existing PG Blurb Output Link
Uses existing Asset Folder Link to place the doc in listing folder
